name: Shortsword
content: Shortsword: Martial melee weapon. Damage 1d6 piercing. Properties: Finesse, Light. Cost 10gp. Weight 2 lb. A common sidearm for rogues and rangers, light enough to wield in either hand.

name: Longbow
content: Longbow: Martial ranged weapon. Damage 1d8 piercing. Properties: Ammunition (range 150/600), Heavy, Two-Handed. Cost 50gp. Weight 2 lb. Favored by rangers and elite archers; can drop a man at three hundred paces.

name: Leather Armor
content: Leather Armor: Light armor. AC 11 + DEX modifier. Cost 10gp. Weight 10 lb. Stiffened boiled leather. No stealth penalty. Common starting armor for rogues, rangers, and wizards who anticipate trouble.

name: Chain Mail
content: Chain Mail: Heavy armor. AC 16. Requires STR 13 or movement reduced by 10ft. Disadvantage on Stealth. Cost 75gp. Weight 55 lb. Interlocking metal rings worn over a leather backing — favored by fighters and clerics.

name: Potion of Healing
content: Potion of Healing: A red liquid in a small glass vial. Drinking it as an action restores 2d4 + 2 hit points. Cost 50gp. Common item. Tastes vaguely of cinnamon and copper. Standard adventuring kit.

name: Antitoxin
content: Antitoxin: A bitter green draught in a glass vial. Drinking it grants advantage on saving throws against poison for 1 hour. Cost 50gp. Useful before delving into spider warrens or assassin-haunted alleys.

name: Thieves' Tools
content: Thieves' Tools: A small cloth-wrapped bundle of lockpicks, a small file, a pair of pliers, a small mirror on a metal handle, and a set of narrow-bladed scissors. Cost 25gp. Weight 1 lb. Required for picking locks and disarming traps. Proficiency adds your bonus to checks.

name: Hempen Rope (50ft)
content: Hempen Rope, 50 feet: Has 2 hit points and can be burst with a DC 17 Strength check. Cost 1gp. Weight 10 lb. Coil it around the shoulder, never travel without it — adventurers who skip rope live shorter lives.

name: Ring of Protection
content: Ring of Protection (Rare, requires attunement): A plain silver band etched with old protective runes. While worn, you gain a +1 bonus to AC and to all saving throws. A favored heirloom of paladins and cautious wizards alike.

name: +1 Dagger
content: +1 Dagger (Uncommon): A finely crafted blade, slightly warm to the touch. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this weapon. Damage 1d4+1 piercing (plus modifiers). Properties: Finesse, Light, Thrown (20/60). A favored gift among rogues.

name: Torch
content: Torch: Burns for 1 hour, sheds bright light in a 20ft radius and dim light for an additional 20ft. As a melee improvised weapon: 1 fire damage on hit. Cost 1cp. Weight 1 lb. The first defense against a dungeon's dark.
